checkin.journal:
Grateful for: Still grateful for this place in Ljubljana, Cosita family friends ❤️❤️❤️, Being nervous but somehow being okay, I slept, At least I didn't wake up in the middle of the night, At least I didn't do all of the other stuff, The temperature was good, the bed was good, the sheets were good, my nose was good, I didn't have any other problems, Just something is tickling my nervous system the whole time
Today great: Honestly, just go through the speech again, rehearse that. And just try to
